case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DEMORIAN BURNSIDE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON AUG-14-2025.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-14-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JAN-14-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BURNSIDE, DEMORIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURNSIDE, DEMORIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 PACIFIC AVE, #427 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BURNSIDE, DEMORIAN DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ;;NO SASE. ENDORSED COPY PLACE IN DEPT 501 OUTBOX
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BURNSIDE, DEMORIAN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BURNSIDE, DEMORIAN
